description_long: This is a tall, black combat-style boot featuring a robust leather-like exterior and reinforced toe cap. The boot has a series of metal eyelets for lacing, with black laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern up the front. On the outer side, three prominent horizontal straps with metal buckles add both visual interest and functional support. The back of the boot is solid, with the straps wrapping around the upper shaft for added security. The sole appears thick and durable, suitable for urban environments, though the tread pattern is not visible. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, utilitarian design ideal for heavy-duty use.
description: A tall, black combat boot with criss-cross lacing, three side buckled straps, and a reinforced toe, made for durability and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the criss-cross lacing, reinforced toe, and the height of the boot shaft.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three horizontal buckled straps and the smooth, solid side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the boot and the wrap-around straps, with no visible lacing.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the uninterrupted side panel and the layered strap design at the top.
